product_results.title: Nike Womens Nike Air Max 270 Sneaker

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable and good looking. They describe them as great sneakers that are perfect in quality. However, customers have mixed opinions about the fit.

authors_reviews.title: yellowed
authors_reviews.text: way to small and turned yellow after third wear. for the price it was an aweful purchase
